steps.assistant_text: IDENTIFIED: libultra osInitialize (KMC-kernel variant, initialize.c) — an IDO 5.3 -O1 ISLAND inside the 7.1 -O2 kernel (7.1 -O1 caps at the ori/jal/move PIF-poll arg shape; 5.3 native).
